THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC., A CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTPORT DEVELOPMENT CO,FKA TRI REALTOR DEVELOPMEN $2,510.48 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $871.24 INTEREST, $126.58 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,168.30 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
OPPOSITION MOTION FOR DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC., A CORP

DEPT. 2, JUDGE QUIDACHAY, L & M OF 1/6/95, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS: UPON CONSIDERATION OF MR. KEEPERMAN'S 1/24/95 LETTER & MR. WARNER'S 1/26/95 LETTER SEEKING CLARIFICATION OF THE COURT'S 1/13/95 MINUTE ORDER IN THIS CASE, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE CLERK ISSUED COMPUTER MINUTE ORDER DOES NOT CONFORM TO THE JUDGE'S ORIGINAL MINUTE ORDER (COPIES ATTACHED). THE CLERK'S COMPUTER GENERATED MINUTE ORDER CONTAINS THE LANGUAGE "ENTIRE ACTION DISMISSED". THE JUDGE'S ORIGINAL MINUTE ORDER DOES NOT. THE JUDGE'S ORIGINAL MINUTE ORDER CONCLUDES WITH THE LANGUAGE "THE MOTION TO DISMISS IS DENIED". THE JUDGE'S 1/13/95 MINUTE ORDER STANDS. DEFENSE COUNSEL'S CONCLUSION THAT THE COUNTER-DECLARATION REQUIREMENT WAS MET BY FILING OF THE MOTION TO DISMISS IS CONTRARY TO THE COURT'S FINDING. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S CONCLUSION THAT THE JUDGMENT STANDS IS A CORRECT STATEMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC., A CORP
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

MOTION TO DISMISS IS DENIED.
